subcodes.first_line: God willing, may ye quaff, at all times, the wine of inner meanings from the chalice of divine bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله رحیق معانی را از کاس عنایت رحمانی در کل حین بیاشامید این رحیق
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
